text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the last day of a productive summer camp and
Tamamo Cross has poured countless hours into
perfecting her new running form...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What do ya think, Trainer? My new form's startin'
to shape up real nice, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All I gotta do now is toughen up my lower body.
Is there any way we can speed up the process?
choice_data_list:
That growth will come naturally. Let's be
patient.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Naturally... Geez, talk about a cruel world...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Well, you are still a child, Tamtam.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, she is. I see a lot of Tome's nephew in
her...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hold on a sec! I don't wanna be treated
like some kid by a couple runners still in their
junior year!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And how come it's gotta be her nephew, huh? Ya
coulda just said "niece," y'know!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What?! Tome has... a niece?! I had no clue...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Graaah! Dat's NOT what I'm sayin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that comeback, our fun-filled time at
summer camp comes to an end.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Anyhoo, how ya been, Oguri? Didja solve that
runnin' problem ya had?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, my cornering's gotten a lot better. And I'll
keep working on it little by little once I've
debuted in the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm nowhere near your level, Tama. But I'll keep
trying.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha. It might sound uppity comin' from
someone who was just beggin' you for help, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You've got this in the bag! I know you'll overcome
any obstacles, just like I did!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well in my case, there's still much to be
done, but that won't stop me from trying.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And one day, I'd really love for the three of us to
run together again, just like we did this summer.
Hopefully, at a racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah, the three of us'll make it one day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'll be up to them to make their dreams a reality.
Their hopeful promise fades away into the
summer evening's sky.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, I don't know what the future holds, but I
better start by settin' an example for my juniors.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Keep your eyes peeled this fall. 'Cause White
Lightnin's new 'n improved, and she's ready to
bring da thunder!
